textPlain: You really do need units in your tables. It is not very obvious you are talking about FPS in them… or is it milliseconds or microseconds. The only place a unit of measurement is actually mentioned (FPS) is the window title of a screenshot.
Quite conventional - its how FreeType works.Computing a bitmap for a glyph is expensive because of all the splines and whatnot.https://freetype.org/freetype2/docs/tutorial/step1.html#sect...
